system.benefit: Double Magnitude damage against Hordes in melee
system.description: When facing massed opponents in combat, the Battle-Brother becomes a whirlwind of death, moving, hacking, gutting, and beheading with ceaseless fury. When attacking an enemy with the Horde trait in close combat, the Battle-Brother doubles any Damage dealt to the Horde's Magnitude. For example, if the Battle-Brother's attacks would reduce the Horde's Magnitude by 3, this amount is doubled to 6.
